data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of conversion linkage to orders and rewards, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this linkage. The linked use case specifies the need for this conversion linkage, yet the prior steps do not demonstrate any evidence of such linkages being established or validated. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary evidence to confirm the requirement is absent.
gaps: No evidence of conversion linkage to orders and rewards.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for conversion linkage
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the conversion linkage to orders and rewards.
